title: Biomes'O'Plenty Redwood Re-Hue
description: This is a simple edit to make BOP's redwood more of it's real-world color as such as making the leaves more vanilla in texture.
body: This pack is very simple is only re-hues ones block type: RedwoodI have decided to do this cause of the absurdly bright red wood I decided to tone it down and also fix the nosiness of the leaves by re-hueing with the spruce leaves texture This is a edit and is not apart of Biomes'O'Plenty I do not associate with them I just had a gripe with this one wood type If you have any suggestions for what Wood-type you want me to change from biomes'o'plenty feel free to do so, just may take me a bit to figure out what to do some textures may have to be changed to fit in with the more Minecraft style textures.
